active_answer: the ability to breathe of the person being tied
active_question: What does Rope365 say to monitor when opening a chest harness’s diamonds makes the tie tighter?
reason: The answer accurately preserves the source's key monitoring requirement as opening the diamonds progressively tightens the harness.
support_evidence: Opening the diamonds will make the tie progressively tighter, watch out for the ability to breathe of the person being tied. Make sure you discuss ahead placement between the legs. You can split ropes after one of the knots to go around the waist instead.
